title: Nirsland's Additions
description: This mod adds fresh new mechanics and other cool things.
body:
![Nirsland's Additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af690983cce93c77ad625f4d7bd3800912736175.png)

Nirsland's Additions is a Minecraft mod that will bring some additions to your game by implementing **a whole new dimension** that you will need to visit. Also it will add 2 new ores: **Enderite** and **Star** ores.
First can be find in The End and second can be found deep in overworld caves.   

**Star Table** is the block where you can upgrade your stats like Health, Speed, and more.

**Poisonous Nether** is the new dimension in this mod. There are 2 new mobs 1 new structure and a plenty of new blocks.

![Poisonous Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3985b854afcf803598a73dbc7815a0a823d820a4_0.webp)
